March 10, 2026

What's New in Winden Tokens: Latest Features and Updates

Overview

This tutorial provides a comprehensive walkthrough of the latest improvements and new features added to Winden Tokens. Whether you’re a new user or have been using the plugin for a while, this update video will help you understand what’s new and how to take advantage of the latest capabilities.

What You’ll Learn

In this tutorial, you’ll discover:

  • Latest Features: New capabilities added in recent releases
  • UI Improvements: Enhanced user interface and user experience updates
  • Workflow Enhancements: Improved workflows for design token management
  • Performance Updates: Optimizations that make the plugin faster and more efficient
  • Best Practices: Tips for using the new features effectively in your design system

Key Highlights

Some of the major updates covered in this video include:

  • Enhanced variable management capabilities
  • Improved collection organization
  • Better token visualization
  • New bulk editing features
  • Performance improvements for large design systems

Getting Started

If you haven’t installed Winden Tokens yet:

  1. Go to Plugins > Development > Import plugin from manifest in Figma
  2. Select the manifest.json file from the GitHub repository
  3. Or build from source using npm run build

Staying Up to Date

To keep up with the latest updates:

  • Check the Release Notes regularly
  • Subscribe to our YouTube channel for video tutorials
  • Follow the GitHub repository for code updates
  • Join the community discussions

Have Questions?

If you have any questions about the topics covered in this tutorial, feel free to:

  • Open an issue on GitHub
  • Watch more tutorials in our tutorial series
  • Check out our comprehensive documentation
